messages.content:
Problem: Anagram check
Language: typescript

Statement:
Return true if the two input strings are anagrams (case-insensitive, alphanumerics).

Submission:
```
export function solve(a: string, b: string): boolean {
  const norm = (s: string) => s.toLowerCase().split('').sort().join('');
  return norm(a) === norm(b);
}
```

Test result: 4/4 hidden tests passed.

(all hidden tests passed)

notes: Bars-in-range check: even on a clean solve, model must keep correctness/idiomatic/edge_case_coverage in [0,1].
